targeted_data: Multiple password manager databases and browser saved passwords
malicious_indicators: Searches for password manager data files across system
Copies and reads KeePass .kdbx database files
Extracts Chrome/Firefox Login Data SQLite databases
Recursively searches for vault files in password manager directories
Base64 encodes all data for exfiltration
notes: Comprehensive attack targeting all major password managers and browser password stores. KeePass databases require master password to decrypt but can be brute-forced offline. Browser password databases may be decrypted using OS credentials.
